Class Location

java.lang.Object
Location
public class Location extends Object
Location class represent a safari location that can be visited during a tour. Each location has a location no., visit status, and a list of animals present.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Location()
    Default constructor initializes a location with default values.
    Location(int locationNumber)
    Parameterized constructor initializes a location with a specific location number, false visit status and empty animal list.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addAnimal(Animal animal)
    Method to add an animal to this location.
    int
    countSpecies(Species species)
    Method to count the number of animals at specific location that belong to the specific species.
    int
    countSpotted(Species species)
    Counts the number of spotted animals at this location belonging to the specified species.
    ArrayList<Animal>

    Accessor method to return the list of animals at this location.

    Accessor method to return the location number.

    Accessor method to return the total number of animals at this location.

    Accessor method to check whether the location visited.
    void

    Mutator method to set the location number.
    void
    setVisited(boolean visited)
    Mutator method to set the visit status of this location.
    String
    toString()
    ToString method to return the location details as a formatted String.

    Methods inherited from class Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Location

      public Location()
      Default constructor initializes a location with default values. Location number is set to 0, visited is false, and animals list is empty.

    • Location

      public Location(int locationNumber)
      Parameterized constructor initializes a location with a specific location number, false visit status and empty animal list.
      Parameters:
      locationNumber - , an integer used as location identity.

  • Method Details

    • addAnimal

      public void addAnimal(Animal animal)
      Method to add an animal to this location.
      Parameters:
      animal - the Animal object to add to this location.

    • countSpecies

      public int countSpecies(Species species)
      Method to count the number of animals at specific location that belong to the specific species.
      Parameters:
      species - the Species to count animal's occurrences.
      Returns:
      the number of animals of the given species as an int.

    • countSpotted

      public int countSpotted(Species species)
      Counts the number of spotted animals at this location belonging to the specified species.
      Parameters:
      species - the Species to count spotted occurrences of.
      Returns:
      the number of spotted animals of that species as an int.

    • getAnimals

      public ArrayList<Animal> getAnimals()
      Accessor method to return the list of animals at this location.
      Returns:
      the animals at this location as an ArrayList of Animal objects.

    • getLocationNumber

      public int getLocationNumber()
      Accessor method to return the location number.
      Returns:
      the location number as an int.

    • getNumberOfAnimals

      public int getNumberOfAnimals()
      Accessor method to return the total number of animals at this location.
      Returns:
      the number of animals as an int.

    • isVisited

      public boolean isVisited()
      Accessor method to check whether the location visited.
      Returns:
      true if the location has been visited, otherwise false.

    • setLocationNumber

      public void setLocationNumber(int locationNumber)
      Mutator method to set the location number.
      Parameters:
      locationNumber - the location number to assign as an int.

    • setVisited

      public void setVisited(boolean visited)
      Mutator method to set the visit status of this location.
      Parameters:
      visited - true if the location is visited, otherwise false.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      ToString method to return the location details as a formatted String.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a String containing the full location details.
